title: Realistic Zombies
description: A remodeled texture pack for zombies!
body:
# **Realistic Zombies**

Do you think Minecraft Zombies need a change? Are you bored of seeing them the same? That's why we have created this interesting design that makes them look similar to skeletons, and makes them even more terrifying!

**Requires EMF or ETF (also works with OptiFine).**
**Can this resourcepack be used in modpacks?**

Of course! As long as it is published only on Modrinth or CurseForge. Uploading it to any other platform would be violating our rights and is not allowed at all.

However, we are really grateful if you consider adding it to your Modrinth or CurseForge modpack. If you need any small changes or have any questions, contact us!
![zombie model showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fee5b38f48f6ecf5ca8d8cb90f4afa0cc70da892.jpeg)![zombie model showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54422fc429827a96640e8016f805d7f3bce29f53.jpeg)
